2606.28061.title: ToolPrivacyBench: Benchmarking Purpose-Bound Privacy in Tool-Using LLM Agents
2606.28061.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have increasingly moved from standalone text generation systems to agents that invoke external tools, access environments, and execute multi-step tasks. However, conventional function-calling benchmarks mainly evaluate task completion and API correctness, while privacy evaluation benchmarks typically focus on final responses or privacy judgments. Neither perspective captures purpose-bound information flow across an executed multi-tool trajectory. Motivated by this limitation in current agent evaluation, ToolPrivacyBench audits whether task-private atoms are routed only to authorized tools and downstream sinks, thereby evaluating both task completion and privacy over-disclosure during tool use. The benchmark contains 2,150 cases, including 1,150 fully synthetic privacy-sensitive business workflows and 1,000 cases adapted from existing multi-tool and function-calling benchmarks. Each case is represented by a policy knowledge base. After an agent executes against mock business backends, the evaluator compares recorded tool arguments and backend audit logs with this policy knowledge base. The evaluation covers nine widely used agents to characterize purpose-bound privacy over-disclosure. The results show that successful tool execution does not imply appropriate privacy disclosure: an agent may complete a task while transmitting unnecessary private information through intermediate tool calls. ToolPrivacyBench therefore formalizes a need-to-know disclosure boundary, under which each tool should receive only the information necessary for its stated purpose, and uses trajectory-level auditing to identify privacy over-disclosure in multi-tool workflows.
2606.28061.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地從獨立的文本生成系統轉變為能夠調用外部工具、訪問環境並執行多步任務的代理。然而，傳統的函數調用基準主要評估任務完成和API正確性，而隱私評估基準則通常專注於最終回應或隱私判斷。這兩種觀點都無法捕捉在執行的多工具軌跡中有目的的信息流。受到當前代理評估中這一限制的啟發，ToolPrivacyBench審計任務私密原子是否僅路由到授權工具和下游接收端，從而評估工具使用過程中的任務完成和隱私過度披露。該基準包含2150個案例，包括1150個完全合成的隱私敏感商業工作流程和1000個改編自現有多工具和函數調用基準的案例。每個案例都由一個政策知識庫表示。在代理對模擬商業後端執行後，評估者將記錄的工具參數和後端審計日誌與該政策知識庫進行比較。該評估涵蓋了九個廣泛使用的代理，以表徵目的導向的隱私過度披露。結果顯示，成功的工具執行並不意味著適當的隱私披露：代理可能在通過中介工具調用傳輸不必要的私密信息的同時完成任務。因此，ToolPrivacyBench正式確立了一個需要知道的披露邊界，在該邊界下，每個工具應僅接收其聲明目的所需的信息，並使用軌跡級審計來識別多工具工作流程中的隱私過度披露。
2606.28061.author: Shijing Hu et.al.
2606.28061.authors: Shijing Hu, Liang Liu, Zhu Meng, Zhicheng Zhao
